{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas statgaja arridsan
eekſch Akaba Namma Zelteem/
jo winna Mahte bija winna
Padohinn-Deweja/ ka tas bes°
deewigs buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas tain
KUNGAM ne patticke/ ittin ka
Akaba Namē/ jo tee bija winna
Padohinn-Deweji/ kad winna
Tehws bija nomirris/ winnam
par Behja-Gefchann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch statgaja arridsan
pelz winnu Padohinn/ un no-
gahje ar Joramu/ Akaba Deh-
lu/ Israēta Kehnizu Karrā/
prett Asaētu to Kehnizu no Sih-
rijas/ us Rahmotu eekſch Gilea-
das. Un tee Sihrexi kawe Jo-
ramu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch greesehs atpak-
fat/ ka wiꞥſch Jesreeē liktohs
Dseedinatees/ jo tam bija Wah-
tes/ kas winnam eekſch Rahmas
bija fiſtas/ kad tas prett Asaē-
tu to Kehnizu no Sihrijas kar-
roja. Un Asarijus/ (Akasijus)
Jorama ta kehniza no Juhda
Dehls/ nogahje Jorainu Akaba
Dehlu Jesreeēe apraudſiht/ jo tas
bija neweffels.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ſchi Satreeſchana ktua
Akasijum no Deewa/ ka tas pee
Joramu nahze/ jo kad wiꞥſch
nahze/ tad iṣgahje wiꞥſch ar Jo-
ramu prett Jeſfu Ninisus Deh-
lm/ fo tas KU NES bij fwai-
dtjs Akaba Nammu isdeldeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Jeu̅s pahr Akas
Namnu to Sohdibu iſlaide/ t
atradde wiꞥſch tohs Leelus-Ku
gus no Juhda un Akasijus Bra
la Dehlus/kas Akasijum kalpo
un nokawe tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz mekleja wiꞥſch A
fju/ un grahbe to Rohkā/ jo
bijā eekſch Samarijas apſ
pees/ un tee wedde to pee J
fu/ un nokawe to/ un aprakke
jo tee fazzija : Wiꞥſch irr Jo-
wata Dehls/ kas no wiﬀas
was Sirde to KUNGU mekle
ta bija Akasijus Nammam
kas/ kam Speheſs buhtu paliz
to Walstibu turreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Atalija Akasi-
Mahte redseja ſawu Dehlu
jam nomirrufchu/ tad winna z
lahs/ un nomaitaja wiſfu A-
niza Dſimmumu ta Nam-
Juhda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Josabeante ta Reh-
na Meita nehme Joatu Aka-
Dehlu/ un nosagge to no ta-
nixa Behrnu Widdu/ kas nok-
ti tappe/ un likke to ar fa-
Embu gullama Kambari.
apſlehpe Josabeante ta Rehn-
Jorama Meita/ ta Preest-
Jojada Seewa/ (jo ta bija A-
fjus Mabfa) winnu preekſch
talijas/ ka ta winnu ne nokaw-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch bija ar te-
Deewa Namina fetchus G-
dus aptlehpts/ un Atalija u-
dija pahr to Semmi.
Ta XXIII. Nodalla.
Joas tohp no Jojabus par Kehnau
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
